text:
7 = Episodes beginning July 2, 2019–January 1, 2020 
8 = Episodes beginning January 2, 2020–July 1, 2020 
9 = Episodes beginning July 2, 2020–January 1, 2021 
10 = Episodes beginning January 2, 2021–July 1, 2021 
11 = Episodes beginning July 2, 2021–December 31, 2021 

COMMENT: In OCM, episodes are initiated on the date of service for an initial Part B chemotherapy drug claim 
with a corresponding cancer diagnosis on the claim, or on the fill date for an initial Part D 
chemotherapy drug claim
